CustomField.description: this will be used for the S.FLOW_2405 to be able to show case info to user on the lookup list.
CustomField.formula: LEFT("Status: " & TEXT(Status) & " / Created: " & TEXT(CreatedDate) & " / Email: " & SuppliedEmail & " / Subject: " & Subject,255)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: info about the case on the lookup list inside the Case Merge flow
CustomField.label: fxCaseInfo
